'''Murr Danod''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]]<ref name="ccg" /> who lived during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace">{{Film|I}}</ref> A [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], he worked for a [[Unidentified trade guild|trade guild]] that operated out of an [[Ithorian Herdship]].<ref name="ccg" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|I}} to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> Danod attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|annual]] [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] at the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. From his seat in the audience, the Ithorian watched as the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] completed the first of three scheduled laps.<ref name="The Phantom Menace" />

Danod had [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and possessed skin the same color as the morality of the items he smuggled: gray.<ref name="ccg" /> The Ithorian's name originated from Ithorian culture. His [[Gender/Legends|masculine]] first name was the name of a [[Murr|beast of burden]] on<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> the planet<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]],<ref name="GCG" /> where his species originated,<ref name="TEA" /> and his family name, Danod, translated to "[[Wine/Legends|winemaker]]."<ref name="GCG" /> He enjoyed such dealings but was nevertheless a peaceful being who was honest to his customers. Danod was [[Force-attunement|Force-attuned]]<ref name="ccg" /> and a fan of Podracing.<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|I|164|Danod, Murr}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Murr Danod first appeared in the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. Initially unnamed,<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> the character was identified on a card included in the [[2001]] ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="ccg" />
